subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out. We’d be happy to set up an introductory call. I’m available on the following windows: 2026-04-21 14:00–16:00 UTC, 2026-04-22 14:00–16:00 UTC, or 2026-04-23 14:00–16:00 UTC. Let me know which option works best and I’ll confirm.

I can’t share internal contact directory information or direct personal phone lines. If you need public-facing information about the team, please refer to the company website.

Best,
Agent
